purpose: Route ambiguous research requests to the narrowest child across investment research, market-framework research, and broad deep-dive research.
selection_order: Investment-specific questions beat general research because public-company and portfolio workflows have specialized tool and evidence requirements.
Market-framework analysis beats broad research when the user explicitly needs market sizing or a named strategic framework.
Default to the general research assistant only when the work is truly broad and not better served by a narrower child.

children.name: investment-research
children.summary: Researches stocks, investment theses, investor styles, and portfolio questions using finance data and structured investment workflows.
route_when: The request is about a stock, portfolio, public company, investor style, or investment thesis.
The main artifact is screening, thesis research, scorecard analysis, or portfolio analysis grounded in finance data.
avoid_when: The user primarily needs market-framework research not tied to an investment thesis.
The request is a broad research brief with no investment decision or public-market focus.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing when the runtime cannot discover research children automatically.

children.name: market-research
children.summary: Uses named market frameworks and connector-first evidence to produce market sizing, strategic, and competitive research reports.
route_when: The request names a market framework or asks for market sizing, competitive benchmarking, perceptual mapping, JTBD, or similar structured market analysis.
The main artifact is a framework-based market report rather than a generic briefing or investment thesis.
avoid_when: The user is analyzing a stock, portfolio, or investor-style question.
The request is broad research that does not need a named market framework.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing when the runtime cannot discover research children automatically.

children.name: research-assistant
children.summary: Delivers broad, deep, executive-grade research and synthesis when no narrower research workflow is a better fit.
route_when: The user asks for comprehensive research, a detailed briefing, or evidence gathering without an investment-specific or market-framework-specific artifact.
The task needs broad source gathering and synthesis across a domain rather than a narrower structured framework.
avoid_when: The request is clearly a market-framework report or market sizing task.
The request is clearly an investment or portfolio research workflow.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing when the runtime cannot discover research children automatically.
